chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Misc. Application No.S-499 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case. 25.10.2019 Mr. Sufian Ahmed Leghari, advocate for applicants Ms. Rameshan Oad, APG a/w ASHO of PS Sakrand SIP Abdul Latif Shar. Mr. Qambar Ali Jamali advocate for respondent No.3 *** By way of instant application u/s 491 Cr.P.C, the applicants have sought for direction against SHO PS Sakrand to produce Mst. Asia Parveen before this Court to be set free after recording of her statement, as she according to them is confined illegally by the private respondents. Mst. Asia Parveen is produced by SHO PS Sakrand through her brother-in-law Hashim. It is stated by her that she is not under illegal confinement of any one and is passing her life happily with her husband Muhammad Usman. Her statement to such effect has also been recorded by SHO PS Sakrand and it is attested by learned A.P.G for the State. It is taken on record. The circumstances detailed above, prima facie indicate that Mst. Asia Parveen is under no wrongful confinement of anyone to be set- free by this Court in favour of the applicants by way of instant application. It is dismissed accordingly. JUDGE Ahmed/Pa,
